matched_to: luxury adventure travel advisors and corporate MICE event planners

leads.title: Business Owner
leads.headline: Owner - Verified Travel Advisor - Arranger - Wandering Puffin Llc
leads.company_address: 1730 New Brighton Blvd # 119, Minneapolis, Minnesota 55413, US
leads.company_description: Wandering Puffin LLC is a boutique United States-based travel agency specializing in bespoke European and global adventures. With over 30 years of expertise, the firm crafts personalized, independent trips for clients that emphasize authentic culture, cuisine, and off-the-beaten-path experiences through rail passes, private guides, and transfers.

leads.title: Director Of Business Development
leads.headline: Director Of Business Development, Latitude Expeditions And Consulting Partner, Deviate Consulting
leads.company_description: Latitude Expeditions is a United States-based custom travel company that designs bespoke itineraries for individual travelers. Operated by Shepro Travel Group, the firm focuses on direct client consultation to create personalized travel plans rather than standardized package tours.

leads.title: Co-Owner & Travel Advisor
leads.headline: Co-Owner & Travel Advisor
leads.company_description: Red Letter Travel is a luxury travel agency and independent affiliate of Brownell Travel that serves clients as personalized travel advisors. The firm provides comprehensive trip planning, including custom itineraries, VIP perks, and white-glove concierge services to ensure reliable support throughout the travel experience.

leads.title: Vice President
leads.headline: Vice President at Huffman Travel
leads.company_address: 1165 N Clark St, Chicago, Illinois, US
leads.company_description: Huffman Travel is a boutique luxury travel consultancy based in the United States with a team of over 20 advisors. They provide full-service planning for bespoke itineraries, including hotel bookings, villa rentals, yacht charters, private aviation, and long-term travel planning for individuals and groups.

leads.title: Owner
leads.headline: Owner At Bluntzer Travel, An Independent Affiliate Of Brownell Travel
leads.company: Bluntzer Travel, An Independent Affiliate Of Brownell Travel
leads.company_description: Bluntzer Travel is an independent affiliate of Brownell Travel, serving as a luxury travel agency in the United States. The firm leverages deep relationships with top-tier cruise lines, hotels, and resorts to provide clients with preferred access and high-level service across global destinations.

leads.title: Owner and Founder
leads.company_description: North Shore Travel LLC is a full-service luxury travel consultancy based in the United States that specializes in designing exclusive, personalized experiences. The firm provides concierge-style planning services for individuals, families, and groups, focusing on comprehensive itineraries that extend beyond standard flight and hotel reservations.

leads.title: Co-owner: GoSaggio
leads.headline: Luxury Travel Advisory Owner and Operator
leads.company_address: 13 Cider Mill Rd, Lynnfield, Massachusetts 01940, US
leads.company_description: GoSaggio Travel is a luxury travel agency based in Boston, Massachusetts, specializing in customized itineraries for domestic and international destinations. The agency acts as a booking agent for suppliers, managing logistics such as flights, accommodations, activities, and ground transfers for its clients.

leads.title: Co-Founder
leads.headline: Co-Founder, Movement Travel
leads.company_description: Movement Travel Ltd is a Canadian independent travel agency affiliated with Internova Travel Group that designs one-of-a-kind travel experiences. The firm partners with top-tier suppliers to create customized multi-week itineraries, luxury and expedition cruises, and short getaways for individuals, families, and couples.

leads.title: Founder
leads.company_description: Outdoor Travel Adventures LLC is a United States-based travel agency specializing in bespoke luxury travel for affluent clients. With 25 years of experience, the firm provides curated trip proposals and seamless logistics for families and couples seeking personalized, life-enhancing vacations with a minimum land budget.

leads.title: President & Owner
leads.headline: President & Owner At Seawind Tours & Travel
leads.company_address: 725 Kapiolani Blvd Suite 301, Honolulu, Hawaii, USA, 96813
leads.company_description: Seawind Tours & Travel is a Virtuoso-accredited luxury travel agency based in Honolulu, Hawaii, specializing in bespoke, high-end global adventures. Founded in 1988, the firm focuses on family travel, food and wine experiences, festivals, and ocean cruising, providing personalized service for complex international itineraries.
